CustomField.formula: IMAGE( IF(Support_Health_Score__c > 65, "/img/msg_icons/confirm24.png", IF(AND(Support_Health_Score__c > 32, Support_Health_Score__c <= 65), "/img/msg_icons/warning24.png", IF(AND(Support_Health_Score__c >= 0 , Support_Health_Score__c <= 32), "/img/msg_icons/error24.png", "/s.gif"))), "Priority Flag")
CustomField.label: Support Health Flag
